allow: PowerShell($nodeVersion = "20.18.0"; $url = "https://nodejs.org/dist/v$nodeVersion/node-v$nodeVersion-x64.msi"; $installer = "$env:TEMP\\nodejs.msi"; Write-Host "Baixando Node.js $nodeVersion..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $installer; Write-Host "Download concluído: $installer")

PowerShell($installer = "$env:TEMP\\nodejs.msi"; Write-Host "Instalando Node.js..."; Start-Process msiexec.exe -ArgumentList "/i `"$installer`" /quiet /norestart ADDLOCAL=ALL" -Wait -PassThru | Select-Object ExitCode; Write-Host "Instalação concluída")
